MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY HERRERA, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ADRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF RICARDO HERRERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADRIAN MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, RICARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ADRIAN $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $940.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
